hero.label: AI · ANALYTICS · AUTOMATION
hero.title: The automation gap is costing you more than you think.
hero.subtitle: Your team is spending hours on work that should run itself. We build the AI infrastructure to fix that — delivered in days, not months.
hero.trustLine: Fixed-price projects. No agency overhead. You own the code.

services.label: — WHAT WE DO
services.title: Three practice areas. One outcome: growth.
services.subtitle: We don't sell software. We build the infrastructure that makes your business run without you.
services.s1desc: Stop guessing. Turn your raw data into real-time dashboards that surface the decisions you actually need to make.
services.s2desc: Every hour your team spends on repetitive work is an hour not spent on growth. We automate the former so you can focus on the latter.
services.s3desc: Deploy AI assistants, extractors, and generators trained on your business context — not generic prompts.

howItWorks.label: — HOW WE WORK
howItWorks.title: Brief on Monday. Staging link on Tuesday. Yours on Friday.
howItWorks.subtitle: No discovery sprints. No lengthy proposals. We scope, build, and ship.
howItWorks.s1desc: Tell us what you need. We turn it into a clear, fixed-price proposal within 24 hours.
howItWorks.s2desc: We build in the open. You get a staging link on day one and can provide feedback throughout.
howItWorks.s3desc: We hand over everything: source code, documentation, and full IP. No lock-in, no dependencies.

pricing.label: — ENGAGEMENT MODELS
pricing.title: Choose how we work together.
pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.

starter.name: Project
starter.desc: A single, fixed-scope delivery for teams that know what they need.

growth.name: Retainer
growth.desc: An ongoing partnership for teams moving fast and shipping constantly.

platform.name: Platform
platform.desc: Self-serve access to our entire library of templates, tools, and automations.

q1.q: How fast is the typical delivery?
q1.a: Most project-tier deliveries are completed within 3–5 business days. Retainer clients get priority: new requests are scoped and started within 24 hours of submission.

q2.q: What tech stack do you use?
q2.a: We work with modern, open-source tools: Next.js, Supabase, n8n for automations, and Anthropic Claude for AI features. We adapt to your existing stack — we don't impose ours.

q3.q: Do I own the code and data?
q3.a: Always. Every deliverable includes full source code and documentation. Your data stays in your infrastructure — we never store client data on our systems.

q4.a: Yes. No lock-in. Cancel with 30 days notice. We earn your business every month through speed and quality — not contracts.

q5.q: What if the deliverable doesn't meet my expectations?
q5.a: We iterate until it does. Our process includes a review phase before final handover. If something isn't right, we fix it at no additional cost. We don't consider a project done until you're satisfied.

q6.a: Yes. We sign NDAs before any sensitive information is shared. All client data and business context is treated as confidential. We never reference client projects in our own materials without explicit permission.

cta.title: Ready to stop doing manually what AI can do in hours?
cta.subtitle: Start with a single project. No commitment, no discovery sprints, no sales pitch.

footer.description: AI infrastructure and automation for startups and growing businesses.
